material_language: warm cream paperboard with cropped black corners
thin document slips with clipped edges
lighting: bright oblique daylight with soft product-table shadows and crisp acrylic edge highlights
object_inventory: one fractured ordering slab crossing the middle of the plate
offset alert and document apertures with cropped interiors
an orbital circular coupon node cutting across straight lanes
thin delivery tabs and claim strips riding the slab edges
feather-barb sorting ribs bending around the rupture
tiny glyph-like inscriptions held as texture, never readable text
negative_constraints: no literal email app, browser chrome, dashboard, desk, office, card grid, shelf, cabinet, or landing-page layout
no legible words, filenames, logos, alphanumeric callouts, or interface labels in the finished image
do not copy the source image subject literally; translate its crop, cream field, diagonal black corners, sparse marks, and small dot gesture into abstract plate grammar
avoid red folded prototype surfaces, ceramic aperture atlas textures, black tape scan fields, floral ruptures, foggy thresholds, corridors, and ambient empty interiors
source marks must remain physical hit surfaces: apertures, seams, nodes, tabs, ribs, glints, and folded edges, not summary cards
no equal-weight grid of source objects
